problem_text_cn: 1427 (1) 写出$\beta^-$衰变的表示式及衰变能计算公式（用原子质量表示）；(2) $^{17}\text{N}$经$\beta^-$衰变到$^{17}\text{O}^*$（最大电子动能3.72 MeV），$^{17}\text{O}^*$发射中子到$^{16}\text{O}$的基态或激发态（$^{16}\text{O}$激发态能量3.05, 6.13, 6.90 MeV）。求中子动能可能的大小（考虑$^{16}\text{O}$反冲）。已知：$M(^{17}\text{N}) = 17.008449\ \mathrm{u}$，$M(^{16}\text{O}) = 15.994915\ \mathrm{u}$，$m_n = 1.008665\ \mathrm{u}$，$1\ \mathrm{u}c^2 = 931.5\ \mathrm{MeV}$。
problem_text_en: 1427 (1) Write $\beta^-$ decay equation and decay energy formula (in terms of atomic masses); (2) $^{17}\text{N}$ decays to $^{17}\text{O}^*$ via $\beta^-$ (max electron KE 3.72 MeV), $^{17}\text{O}^*$ emits neutron to $^{16}\text{O}$ ground or excited states (3.05, 6.13, 6.90 MeV). Find possible neutron KE (consider $^{16}\text{O}$ recoil). Given: $M(^{17}\text{N}) = 17.008449\ \mathrm{u}$, $M(^{16}\text{O}) = 15.994915\ \mathrm{u}$, $m_n = 1.008665\ \mathrm{u}$, $1\ \mathrm{u}c^2 = 931.5\ \mathrm{MeV}$.
img_cn: 图1427_1：$^{17}\text{N}$衰变及中子发射示意图
img_en: Fig. 1427_1: Diagram of $^{17}\text{N}$ decay and neutron emission
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) $\beta^-$衰变：$^A_Z\text{X} \to ^A_{Z+1}\text{Y} + e^- + \bar{\nu}_e$，衰变能$E_d = [M(\text{X}) - M(\text{Y})]c^2$；(2) 由$E_d(\beta^-) = 3.72\ \mathrm{MeV}$得$M(^{17}\text{O}^*)c^2 = M(^{17}\text{N})c^2 - 3.72\ \mathrm{MeV}$，再由$M(^{17}\text{O}^*)c^2 - [M(^{16}\text{O})c^2 + E^*(^{16}\text{O})] - m_nc^2 > 0$判断，仅$E^* = 0$可行，中子动能$E_n = 0.82 \times \frac{16}{17} \approx 0.77\ \mathrm{MeV}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) $\beta^-$ decay: $^A_Z\text{X} \to ^A_{Z+1}\text{Y} + e^- + \bar{\nu}_e$, decay energy $E_d = [M(\text{X}) - M(\text{Y})]c^2$; (2) From $E_d(\beta^-) = 3.72\ \mathrm{MeV}$, get $M(^{17}\text{O}^*)c^2 = M(^{17}\text{N})c^2 - 3.72\ \mathrm{MeV}$. Only $E^* = 0$ satisfies $M(^{17}\text{O}^*)c^2 - [M(^{16}\text{O})c^2 + E^*] - m_nc^2 > 0$, neutron KE $E_n = 0.82 \times \frac{16}{17} \approx 0.77\ \mathrm{MeV}$.
problem_answer: (1) $\beta^-$衰变：$^A_Z\text{X} \to ^A_{Z+1}\text{Y} + e^- + \bar{\nu}_e$，衰变能$\boldsymbol{E_d = [M(\text{X}) - M(\text{Y})]c^2}$；(2) 中子动能仅有一种可能，$\boldsymbol{0.77\ \mathrm{MeV}}$（对应$^{16}\text{O}$基态）。
